title: The Energy Case
tagline: A detective-action game with a message
description: Solve a murder case in a noir-dieselpunk world filled with robotic bugs. Modify your body to access new abilities, a choice between fossil-fuel-powered industrial models, or new experimental and greener technologies.

paragraph_1.heading: A clear objective
paragraph_1.text:
It's easy to feel discouraged towards climate change.

The energy case aims to bring to light the developements that have accoured in recent years regarding the transition to clean energy sources, and give you the chance to be part of it.

paragraph_2.heading: Your role
paragraph_2.text:
You are Detective Dominik 'Dec' Decker, a robotic ant detective on the case!

You must investigate, explore, collect clues, interrogate witnesses, and put everything together to solve the case. Be careful, as dangers await around every corner. Upgrade your body with new parts to defend yourself against attackers.

article.tagline: SOLVE A CRIME TO CHANGE THE WORLD

paragraph_3.heading: Release
paragraph_3.text: The Energy Case will release a demo in Q2 2026 and chapter 1 will release for PC in 2028 on Steam.
